name: Econach Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Econach Holdings Co.,Ltd. operates in the spa and real estate businesses in Japan. The company also sells and rents real estate properties, as well as owns shares. In addition, it manufactures and sells lace and embroidery products. The company was formerly known as Econach Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Econach Holdings Co.,Ltd. in August 2010. Econach Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
